name: Wolkenkraft Äris
summary: A full-convection portable vaporiser with OLED control, for patients who want clean flavour in a compact body.
description: The Wolkenkraft Aris is a compact convection device that heats only the air drawn through your herb, giving pure flavour and even extraction. Temperature runs from 160 to 221C on a high-resolution OLED screen, with a memory function and a stealth mode that dims the display for discretion. It heats up in around 30 seconds and runs on a 2300mAh USB-C battery, with a zirconium ceramic mouthpiece and cooling path to smooth each draw. Backed by a five-year warranty, it suits patients who want convection quality without stepping up to the larger Ultra.

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Anodized Aluminium Body, Zirconium Ceramic Mouthpiece
